title: Auto Bucket Clutch
description: This Data Pack Lets You Do A Water Bucket Clutch. But It's Automatic :]
body:
- **[Note: This Does Not Work If You Have A Elytra On]**
- **This Data Pack Lets You Do A Water Bucket Clutch. But It's Automatic :)**
- **Before You Try This In Your World Type /trigger auto_clutch_on**
- Look Straight Down With A Water Bucket To Auto Clutch, It Only Works For 12 Block Falls Or Higher, But Make Sure To Jump To Make It Work Properly.
- ﻿The Auto Bucket Clutch Data Pack That Actually Works.
